title: Electroweak doublet dark matter for the galactic halo gamma-ray excess
bridge_note: Halo γ-ray excess is fit by a minimal DM model, but m_DM and coupling parameters remain degenerate. Constraint stacking narrows the parameter space without selecting a unique solution.
cosine_bridge: Fit ≠ identifiability. Constraints reduce space but do not resolve branches; identifiability emerges only with independent (orthogonal) constraints at sufficient precision (45° 📐 signal > noise).
engagement_detail: Tweet + Grok thread connected paper’s residual degeneracy to repo demos (01–04): constraints ≠ uniqueness; stable ≠ correct; precision threshold; orthogonality threshold.
notes_internal: Primary bridge uses repo (constraint-branch-selection) rather than a single notebook; 04 orthogonality threshold is key link to identifiability.
